titleStmt.title: SII 6.854: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 854. (A.R. No. 286-J of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī karipradyōtasaṁkhyē tathā māghē māsi trivikramadinē kṛṣṇē daśamyāṁ tithau
prādātsiṁhagirīśvarāya vidhi bhīṣṭāptayē bhaktyā śrīśivadāsacaṁ
danamahāpātraprabhussammudā . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 128 gunēṁṭi māgha kṛṣṇa daśamiyu ravivāramu
nnu makarasaṁkrāṁtināṁḍu sivadāsa śrīcaṁdanamahāpātruṁḍu tanaku Abhīṣṭā¨rtthasiddhigānu śrīnarasi
ṁhyanāthuniki nityamunnu sama¨rppiṁccina kolupulu nityamunnu tirumajjanamu kuṁḍāṁḍu tēnu jīyyanā
tha puruṣōttamanāyakuniki nibaṁdamu 1 Abhiṣēkakālānanu puruṣōttamajī[Eṁ]ḍunu ya vuruṣu
niki ni 1 . sa¨rvvadēvaciṁgupaṁḍennu I Appapaṁḍegunu ni 1 . ṟēpaṭi dhūpakālānanu Alāvaṭṭamu paṭṭanu bhēṟi
narasiṁhanāyakuṁḍunnu jagannāthanāyakuṁḍunnu ni 1 . goḍavupaṭṭanu maṁcunāyaka tiruvaḍināya
kuniki ni 1 . rātriṁṭi dupakalānanu goḍavupaṭṭanu mādhavanāyakuniki ni 1 . Ī Āṟu nibaṁdhālavā
rikinni gaṁḍalu nālgēśi māḍalu Icci vīrivaśanē kuṁcaṁḍēśi prasādamu ṭhāvupaṭṭi peṭṭenu . bhēṟigōpu
nāyakuniki gaṁḍalu Āṟu māḍalunnu Ēnu cinnālunnu Ici kuṁcanaḍḍa pranādamu ṭhāvupaṭṭi nityamu
nnu tirumāla Ātupāsi nālumūḷa teci peṭṭanu Itaniki Iccenu Ī dha¨rmmuvu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāIgāṁ je
llaṁgaladu . śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.854 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
